brand_voice: The ranger who knows the ground — calm, competent, plainspoken, never loud. Short sentences. Client is the hero.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium font-serif
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium font-serif
hierarchy.h3: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium font-serif
hierarchy.caption: text-sm tracking-widest uppercase font-semibold text-secondary font-sans
hierarchy.marquee: text-5xl sm:text-7xl tracking-tight font-serif italic text-primary/10

signature_moments: Kinetic Hero Reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal of the hero headline. Use Framer Motion whileInView or initial/animate on mount, animating text line by line or word by word from y: 20px, opacity: 0, blur: 10px to y: 0, opacity: 1, blur: 0.

3D Logo Parallax: The provided animated SVG brand mark must be embedded inline, centered, and have a subtle 3D tilt tracking the mouse cursor (using framer-motion useMotionValue/useTransform). Keep an LCP-safe container with locked aspect-ratio.
Editorial Marquee: One continuous slow horizontal marquee of the tagline 'The sound of your message connecting loud and clear.' running in the background of a section.
Section Scroll-Reveals: Asymmetrical entry animations for bento grids and text blocks, maintaining the calm and plainspoken brand voice.
motion.accessibility: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion CSS media query.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to create a premium editorial feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Asymmetry creates tension. Use CSS Grid or Tailwind grid-cols-12. Avoid centered layouts. Overlap elements slightly where it makes sense.

component_guidelines.buttons: Minimalist, no heavy shadows. Flat or very subtle rounded borders. On hover: slide animation or color shift. CTA is 'Find out if we're the right fit'.
component_guidelines.cards: Cardless or 1px border (#231f20 at 10% opacity). Flat backgrounds, no soft soft drop-shadows. Focus on typography for hierarchy.
component_guidelines.forms: Minimalist input fields (e.g. border-b only, or clean soft gray background). No third-party schedulers.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky nav. Must have a light background (e.g., bg-[#F4F5F7]/80 backdrop-blur-md) so the SVG animation reads clearly. Logo on left, single CTA on right.
component_guidelines.footer: Generous py-32 space. Logo mark, LinkedIn (only social), Cookie preferences modal trigger, Privacy/Sitemap links.

sections: Hero: Centered 3D animated SVG mark, kinetic masked headline below it, Tagline: 'The sound of your message connecting loud and clear.'
Why Now (Signal over noise): Wedge layout, dark typography, asymmetrical.
The Promise: 'Auditable-bill promise' - full bleed section, inverted dark theme (bg: #184887, text: #F4F5F7) for dramatic trust anchor.
Differentiators: Side-by-side 'Senior hands' and 'Bill you can read'.
Manifesto Chapters: 'The diagnose-before-prescribe method'. Numbered large (e.g. 01, 02) editorial chapters, single column text blocks with wide margins.
Services Grid: Bento layout. 'Websites that work', 'Ongoing care', 'Social media management', 'Paid advertising management', 'Enriched media'.
Q&A Archive: Marked up as FAQPage JSON-LD in the head. Minimalist 1-2 sentence answers per block.
Fit Form: The single conversion page. Form with Name, Business, and 'What prompted the visit'. Calm reassurance framing text on the side.
Cookies Section: Detailed content. Add a load-blocking consent banner (GA4 + Clarity opt-in via localStorage) and a footer modal.
Not Found: In-voice calm message, clear route back to home.

imagery.style: Real product photography treated deliberately. Atmospheric abstracts, texture close-ups, editorial black-and-white portraits. Spotlight, clipped frames.

hero_background_abstract.description: Serene blue mountain ridges under a foggy sky. Use as an ambient background element if needed.

how_it_works_metaphor.description: Black and white misty mountains. Metaphor for 'the ranger who knows the ground'.

differentiator_senior_hands.description: Grayscale photo of a person holding a pocket watch. Use for 'Senior hands' section.

signals_abstract.description: Smooth flowing blue fabric. Use as a textural asset in 'Signals' or 'Enriched media'.

promise_texture.description: Black and white modern circular metal facade detail. Editorial architecture for structural/promise themes.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties to prevent breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in global CSS. Optical alignment over geometrical.
Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components from src/components/ui. Do not build custom complex interactive components from scratch.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Header MUST NOT have a fully transparent background. Ensure it maintains readability over content.
Ensure the provided SVG brand logo is embedded inline and its CSS/JS animation is preserved. Create an LCP-safe container to prevent CLS.
Fit page form must be built natively without relying on a third-party scheduler.
